# Seascape Vacations

> Luxury vacation rentals in Bradenton and Anna Maria Island, Florida. 5 homes with private pools and direct booking saves 10-15%.

## Key Facts
- 5 vacation rental homes across Bradenton (4) and Sarasota (1), Florida
- Nightly rates from $250-$800 depending on season and property
- Areas served: Anna Maria Island, Holmes Beach, Bradenton Beach, Bradenton, Sarasota, Siesta Key, Longboat Key
- Direct booking saves guests 10-15% vs Airbnb/VRBO (no service fees, $50 coupon code SAVE50)
- 4.8-star average across 200+ guest reviews
- Locally owned and operated — not a franchise or large property manager

## Properties
- [The Oasis](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/the-oasis/): Spacious Bradenton home with private pool. 5BR/3BA, sleeps 16.
- [Dockside Dreams](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/dockside-dreams/): Bradenton waterfront retreat with deep-water dock, bay access, and heated pool. 4BR/3BA, sleeps 12.
- [River House](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/river-house/): Bradenton home near the river (1 min to boat ramp) with pool and hot tub. 4BR/3BA, sleeps 12.
- [Bradenton Pool Home](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/bradenton-pool-home/): Private pool home in quiet Bradenton neighborhood, 12 minutes from beaches. No pets. 3BR/3.5BA, sleeps 10.
- [Sarasota Luxe](https://seascape-vacations.com/properties/sarasota-luxe/): Downtown Sarasota home with screened lanai and modern finishes. 4BR/3BA, sleeps 12.

## Vacation Rentals by Area
- [Anna Maria Island Vacation Rentals](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/anna-maria-island-vacation-rentals/): Rental options near AMI beaches — pricing, availability, and what to expect
- [Vacation Rentals Bradenton Florida](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/vacation-rentals-bradenton-florida/): Bradenton rental guide with waterfront homes, pool properties, and family-friendly picks
- [Bradenton Beach House Rental](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/bradenton-beach-house-rental/): Beach house options near Bradenton Beach with pricing and availability
- [Pet-Friendly Vacation Rentals Anna Maria Island](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/pet-friendly-vacation-rentals-anna-maria-island/): Dog-friendly rental homes near AMI with yard space and beach access
- [Family Vacation Rentals Anna Maria Island](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/family-vacation-rentals-anna-maria-island/): Family-sized homes near AMI with pools, kid-friendly features, and beach proximity
- [Bradenton Waterfront Vacation Rentals](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/bradenton-waterfront-vacation-rentals/): Waterfront homes with boat docks, river access, and Gulf proximity in Bradenton
- [Luxury Vacation Rentals Sarasota](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/luxury-vacation-rentals-sarasota/): High-end Sarasota rentals near Siesta Key and Lido Key beaches
- [Florida Gulf Coast Vacation Rentals](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/florida-gulf-coast-vacation-rentals/): Gulf Coast rental overview — Bradenton to Sarasota corridor
- [Holmes Beach Vacation Rentals](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/holmes-beach-vacation-rentals/): Rentals near Holmes Beach on Anna Maria Island's central strip
- [Book Direct vs Airbnb/VRBO](https://seascape-vacations.com/stays/book-direct-vs-airbnb-vrbo/): Cost comparison showing how direct booking saves $150-400+ per stay

## Area Guides
- [Anna Maria Island Area Guide](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/anna-maria-island-area-guide/): Beaches, restaurants, activities, and logistics for visiting AMI
- [Bradenton Area Guide](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/bradenton-area-guide/): Neighborhoods, dining, and outdoor activities in Bradenton
- [Bradenton vs Sarasota Comparison](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/bradenton-vs-sarasota-vacation-rental-comparison/): Side-by-side comparison for families, retirees, and beach lovers
- [Anna Maria Island Vacation Cost Guide 2026](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/anna-maria-island-vacation-cost-guide-2026/): Detailed cost breakdown — nightly rates, dining, activities, and seasonal pricing
- [Best Time to Visit Anna Maria Island](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/best-time-to-visit-anna-maria-island/): Month-by-month weather, crowds, pricing, and events
- [Best Restaurants Anna Maria Island](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/best-restaurants-anna-maria-island/): Local restaurant picks from seafood to casual dining
- [Things to Do Bradenton FL](https://seascape-vacations.com/guides/things-to-do-bradenton-fl/): Activities, attractions, and day trips from Bradenton
